description: Historical B/C backfill from Gamma API resolved markets + CLOB daily price history
methodology: For each resolved binary market, fetched daily CLOB price history. The last pre-resolution price above 0.5% was used as the signal price. Markets where that price exceeded 85% on one side qualified as B/C signals.
